feed.text: Antman boarded the S.S. Anne with Red nearby, continuing the journey through a real harbor route instead of a WorldLink jump.
Red stayed close on the main deck and marked the ship as too crowded for a normal cruise.
Blue was spotted aboard the S.S. Anne, already asking passengers who has seen Antman.
Bill found Rocket-linked cargo edits below deck. The cargo hold is the next suspicious target.
A passenger mentioned the Captain's Trail Cutter prototype, an early replacement for old HM-style roadblocks.
